body: just got out of student gov — amara and i spent like two hours debating whether to petition admin over the dining hall contract renewal. feels like municipal budget politics in miniature lol
Ha, sounds familiar. Which side were you on?
transparency side obviously. amara drafted the memo, i cleaned up the language during my tutoring shift earlier. priya thinks we're both too deep in it
Priya's usually right. Eat something, Brian.
Brian did you eat before your shift today?? Priya told me you had back to back tutoring sessions AND a student gov meeting tonight 😩 that's too much in one day
Priya is such a snitch lol. I ate between sessions, I'm fine. Meeting's at 8 in the union, not that deep.
She loves you more than you deserve 😂 tell Amara I said hello. And fill that water bottle before you walk in there.
Already filled it, relax. Tell Dad I'll call him Thursday.
emeka did you forget mom's birthday is saturday or are you also scrambling rn bc i'm about to drag you 😭
bro i have a card i just need to mail it — i got it handled chill
you 'have it handled' like how you 'had it handled' when dad's thing was last year and you showed up with a gas station balloon
ok FAIR but i ordered her flowers online so i'm literally better than both of us this time
amara just texted me something cryptic about 'the vote' 👀 please tell me it went through
it passed. 8-4. three weeks of revisions and Amara almost went scorched earth on the treasurer but we got there lol
ok FINALLY. you eat? writing center shift + that meeting back to back is a lot even for you
grabbed something from the vending machine rip. priya's already asleep so I'm just gonna crash. coffee tmrw before my 10?
priya did you grab my water bottle off the kitchen counter before you left?? i'm at the writing center until 6 and i'm already failing myself on the hydration front 😭
lmaooo yes it's in your backpack i put it there this morning ur welcome
wait actually?? you're a saint. marcus would've just watched me suffer
he literally would have. ok go tutor people. also amara texted asking if you're coming to student gov tonight
brian did you see the amendment Chen submitted for thursday's mtg?? wants to cut writing center funding 15% to expand the maker space 💀 we need a counter before 6pm tmrw
already saw it. pulled three peer-reviewed studies on writing center impact on first-gen retention rates lol not losing that budget without receipts
ok YES send those to me asap — drafting our floor statement tonight. is Priya coming to watch? trying to get a read on room support before we walk in
Priya's got lab til 8 so no. sending sources now give me like 20 min, just finishing up a tutoring shift. also somebody needs to tell Marcus to stop texting me during sessions 😭
Brian — quick check-in. Annotated bib for the municipal governance piece was due this morning. Did I miss your email or is it still coming?
it's still coming 😬 tutoring ran long + student gov meeting w/ Amara went completely sideways over the Syracuse housing resolution. sending by 9pm tonight, promise
The housing resolution — that's actually relevant to ch. 3 on zoning policy capture. Flag anything useful while it's fresh. 9pm works.
already on it, pulled two sources during the meeting lol. ty for the grace — sending tonight
hey dr. adeyemi — marcus has been on me about rescheduling that annual appt since i pushed it back in april. my Writing Center shift is tues 2-5, can we do thurs morning before my 11am class block?
Hi Brian! Thursday works — I have 8:30 or 9am open. Let's do 9 so you're not rushed getting across Syracuse. Front desk will send a confirmation.
9am is perfect, thx. priya offered to drive me which honestly saves my life lol. appreciate the flexibility — my schedule this semester is genuinely unhinged
Confirmed for 9am Thursday. Tell Priya she's a good roommate. And fill that water bottle before you come in, I'm going to ask 😄
Your dad mentioned you've got a big student gov meeting this week — said you and Amara are pushing a new proposal? Praying it goes well. God's using you out there in Syracuse, Brian.
haha Chidi can't help himself lol. yeah it's Wednesday, been prepping between tutoring shifts. appreciate the prayer fr, gonna need it
That's what we're here for. Let me know how it goes — and tell your mom I said hello. She hasn't missed a Sunday in months, sets the bar for all of us 😄
will do 😭 she really is built different. I'll update you after Wednesday, promise
uncle tunde do you have that copy of frug & orenstein's municipal governance breakdown?? amara and I are prepping our student gov agenda for this week and I can't find mine anywhere 😭
lmaooo Brian I'm a contractor not a librarian. check the Syracuse university library portal — they definitely have it
you're right you're right. also tell me you saw the writing center got new lighting finally. Priya almost walked into a shelf last week it was that dark
FINALLY. that place was a liability. tell Priya I said hi and drink some water boy

yo jordan did u see amara's proposal for the student gov budget meeting tonight?? she's trying to reallocate like 30% of the events fund and i'm still in my tutoring shift lol i haven't even read it fully
bro no i just got it. skimming now. she's ambitious fr 😭 u gonna push back or let it ride?
idk man. on one hand the events fund is cooked, on the other hand chidi raised me to not let a bad spreadsheet slide 💀 saving my thoughts for the room
LMAOOO ok 'chidi raised me right' is actually the most brian sentence ever. see u there, grab coffee on james st if u can
camille did u finalize the agenda for thursday?? i have tutoring til 5 and Amara keeps texting me abt the housing resolution like i can fix it from the Writing Center lol
lmaooo tell her to chill. yes agenda is done — added the off-campus housing item under new business, that's literally her moment to shine
ok good. can u also squeeze in 5 mins for the multicultural fund update? i finally have the numbers from facilities
done ✓ see u thursday — and please eat something before u come, u always look like a ghost by 6pm
yo did ur student gov meeting with amara get pushed again or is it still 6pm? asking bc i was gonna swing by the writing center after ur shift
still on for 6, amara confirmed this morning. i'm on shift til 5:30 so it'll be tight but i'll make it
lol classic brian schedule. priya texted me btw, said ur water bottle is still on the kitchen counter. third day running man 😭
ok i genuinely forgot it AGAIN. grabbing from the dining hall, tell her i owe her one

Brian — just finished reading your participatory budgeting draft. The Syracuse case study angle is genuinely sharp, but your Fung & Wright citations are missing page numbers. Need those before Thursday's seminar.

ugh, caught. was running b/t Writing Center shift and SGA meeting when I submitted it — will fix tonight after 11 when Priya stops commandeering the kitchen table. ty for actually reading it closely tho
Ha. Midnight's fine. Seriously though — your section 3 argument is the strongest thing in the draft. Don't bury it. Lead with it in the revision.
noted, section 3 gets the spotlight. sending revised by 11:59 like the responsible overachiever I pretend to be 😅
hey brian — we've got 3 walk-ins stacked up at the Writing Center and two are asking about research proposals. you still stuck in SGA? 😬
yeah Amara's presenting the budget rec right now, can't leave mid-vote. out by 4:15 I promise
ok I'll push the 4pm to 4:20. just so you know you're literally the only tutor these research kids trust, which is flattering and also a you-problem
heard, filling my water bottle and power-walking across campus as we speak
yo did u end up making it to student gov meeting last night?? amara texted me saying it went long
yeah til like 9:30 lol. amara carried the whole agenda debate ngl, I just sat there half-asleep
classic. u working the writing center today or actually getting food before ur next class
shift starts at 2 so maybe if I sprint across campus first 😭 priya stole my granola bar so literally running on nothing rn
Hey Kevin — hot water's been out since this morning. Priya and I both have 8am classes tmrw, any chance maintenance can get in today?
Got it, I'll send Marcus over by 4 — wait, my guy, not your Marcus lol. Tech from the company. Pilot light probably. Shouldn't be long.
Works. I'm at the Writing Center til 3:30 but Priya's home by then, she can let him in.
Perfect. Should hold this time — same unit flaked out last January too. I'll note it in the file.
currently trapped in a tutoring session that was supposed to end 20min ago, kid cannot figure out APA citations, and amara has already texted me twice about the student gov meeting 😭
lmaooo amara does NOT play about those meetings. just blame the writing center
if i cite 'my roommate was loud all night' as my source for being 10min late she's gonna want a works cited page
priya strikes again lmao. honestly just send amara a formatted outline she'll forgive you
bro i might be coming through syracuse saturday, you free?? haven't seen you since thanksgiving and marcus keeps posting y'all looking cozy in the snow like ok we get it 😭
lmaooo he IS cozy but saturday i got Writing Center til 4 then student gov with Amara. after 6 is yours tho — priya's making jollof so your timing would actually be perfect
priya's jollof alone is worth the drive. also bro when do you sleep. every time i check your location you're still on campus at midnight
sleep is for people who didn't stack a research job on top of a tutor shift on top of student gov. see you at 6, don't be late or priya will give your bowl to marcus
Brian!! your mom said you've been tutoring til 9pm AND doing student gov the same nights?? that's too much baby. you eating real food or just vending machine stuff in Syracuse 😭
aunt grace i promise i'm fine lol. priya literally made jollof last tuesday so i'm surviving. the gov meetings run late but amara keeps us on track
ok good because i was THIS close to calling Adaeze 😂 tell me about the tutoring though — what are you even helping students with rn
mostly argumentative essays and lit reviews, which is funny bc i'm drowning in my own paper on municipal governance 💀 it's due friday and i have a full class block tmrw
